parsed.explanation: Fixed two XML syntax errors: 1) Escaped the unescaped ampersand ('&') in the book title to '&' to comply with XML parsing rules. 2) Corrected the mismatched closing tag '</PRICE>' to '</PRIZE>' to properly match the opening '<PRIZE>' element. The existing semantic markup (<BIBL>, <TITLE>, <PRIZE>) is structurally sound, so no additional tags were required.
